requirements.text: store.delete(session_id) removes rows from both session_tps and call_events
requirements.acceptance: After delete('s1'), SELECT COUNT(*) FROM call_events WHERE session_id = 's1' returns 0

requirements.text: store.delete_expired(max_age) removes orphaned call_events whose session_id is absent from session_tps
requirements.acceptance: After deleting old sessions, no call_events rows reference non-existent sessions
LRU eviction removes both memory and DB state

requirements.text: New tests cover call_events cleanup paths
requirements.acceptance: Tests for delete, delete_expired, and eviction with call_events data

success_criteria: store.delete('s1') removes all call_events for session s1
